directive_events.owner_directive: Protected-core src/scistudio/workflow/validator.py draft-validation mode authorized by owner (admin-approved:core-change). Batch of 7 owner-reported fixes in one PR.
Owner-chosen fix: carve a top region listing all workflow plots (available+broken), keep the existing relink; flag broken targets with a warning since detection already exists via discover_targets.
directive_events.reason: Address codex PR #1712 P1: relink entry point was unreachable because the plot list was scoped to the selected node, but a broken plot's old node can no longer be selected. DataPreview now lists workflow-wide plots in an always-visible top region with a broken-target flag; list_plots returns a node-level 'broken' field. Same bug#7 files.

docs_events.rationale: owner-directed live hotfix batch (#1711) of owner-reported desktop/canvas/plot bugs; all changes are behavior/bug fixes covered by unit+integration tests. No user docs or public contract changed except the new internal POST /api/plots/{id}/relink endpoint whose contract lives in api/schemas.py (PlotRelinkRequest/Response) and is test-covered; no ADR/spec change required per owner scope.

findings.message: protected core/runtime change requires admin-approved:core-change applied by an authorized maintainer or administrator approval
governed change requires docs/changelog/checklist landing evidence or an explicit N/A rationale
Sentrux evidence is recommended for source/workflow/architecture changes (advisory, opt-in).

owner_directive: Owner-directed live session: fix 7 reported desktop/canvas/plot bugs in one PR — PTY clip-on-resize + scramble-on-tab-switch, user-terminal PYTHONPATH conda crash, canvas draft validation + dismissable error banner, plot previewer zoom/pan + larger matplotlib fonts, node port spacing, plot relink. Closes #1711. admin-approved:core-change for workflow/validator.py draft mode.
